title: Community Level Browser
summary: Add a curated 'Community Levels' section to the level select screen with 20 embedded community levels, a Featured Level of the Week spotlight, difficulty ratings, client-side play tracking, share/submit functionality, and a Community Creator achievement. Levels load via existing #custom= URL mechanism.

tasks.description: Create COMMUNITY_LEVELS constant array with 20 curated community levels as JSON objects. Each level has: id (community_1..20), name, creator (optional), difficulty (Easy/Medium/Hard), inputCount, outputCount, truthTable, gates, featured flag. Mix of 2-input easy levels, 3-input medium, and 4-input hard.
acceptance_criteria: COMMUNITY_LEVELS array has exactly 20 entries
Each entry has: id, name, creator, difficulty, inputCount, outputCount, truthTable, gates
At least 6 Easy, 8 Medium, 6 Hard levels
One level has featured: true
Truth tables are valid (2^inputCount rows, each row has inputCount+outputCount values)

tasks.description: Add '🌐 Community Levels' section to the level select screen HTML (in index.html). Place it below the Challenge Mode section. Include: section header, featured spotlight container, level cards grid, and 'Submit Your Level' button.
acceptance_criteria: Community section appears below challenge mode on level select
Has a section header '🌐 Community Levels'
Has #community-featured container for featured level spotlight
Has #community-levels-grid container for level cards
Has 'Submit Your Level' button that copies share URL from creator

tasks.description: Implement renderCommunitySection() in ui.js that populates the community grid. Each card shows: name, creator, difficulty badge (🟢/🟡/🔴), play count (from localStorage), and completed checkmark if done. Featured level gets a spotlight card at top with gold border.
acceptance_criteria: All 20 community levels render as cards
Featured level shows as spotlight at top with gold styling
Difficulty badges: 🟢 Easy, 🟡 Medium, 🔴 Hard
Completed levels show ✅ checkmark
Cards are clickable and load the level

tasks.description: Implement community level loading. Clicking a community card converts the community level data to the same format as buildCustomLevel() and loads it via loadChallengeLevel(). Track play count in localStorage under 'communityPlays'.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking a community level card loads the level in gameplay screen
Level plays correctly with proper truth table and available gates
Play count increments in localStorage each time a community level is started
Back button returns to level select

tasks.description: Track community level completions separately in localStorage under 'communityCompleted'. When a community level is solved, mark it as completed. Show completion count (e.g., '3/20 completed') in the section header.
acceptance_criteria: Solving a community level marks it completed in localStorage
Completed count shows in section header
Completed levels show ✅ on their card
Completion persists across sessions

tasks.description: Add difficulty rating calculation for community levels based on inputCount, outputCount, and truth table complexity (number of non-trivial output patterns). Classify as Easy (2 inputs, 1 output), Medium (3 inputs or 2 outputs), Hard (4 inputs or 3+ outputs).
acceptance_criteria: getCommunityDifficulty() function exists
Returns 'Easy', 'Medium', or 'Hard' based on level properties
Difficulty badges on cards match the computed difficulty

tasks.description: Add 'Submit Your Level' button that navigates to the Level Creator screen. Also add a 'Featured Level of the Week' that rotates based on the current week number (week of year modulo 20).
acceptance_criteria: Submit button navigates to creator screen
Featured level rotates weekly based on date
Featured spotlight shows the current week's featured level with special styling

tasks.description: Add CSS styling for community section: cards with circuit-themed dark backgrounds, difficulty badge colors, featured spotlight with gold border and glow, hover effects on cards, and responsive grid layout.
acceptance_criteria: Community cards have dark circuit-themed styling
Featured level has gold border and subtle glow
Difficulty badges are color-coded
Cards have hover lift effect
Grid is responsive: 2 cols on mobile, 3-4 on desktop

tasks.description: Add upvote counter for community levels. Client-side only: store upvotes in localStorage under 'communityUpvotes'. Each level can be upvoted once (toggle). Show heart icon with count on each card.
acceptance_criteria: Each card shows a heart icon with upvote count
Clicking heart toggles upvote (on/off)
Upvote state persists in localStorage
Visual feedback on upvote (heart turns red when active)

tasks.description: Wire up 'Community Creator' achievement — earned after sharing 3+ custom levels via the creator. Update achievements.js. Also add cache bust to index.html script tags.
acceptance_criteria: Community Creator achievement triggers after 3 shared levels
Achievement shows in achievements modal
Cache bust version incremented on all script/css tags

testing_focus: Community levels load and play correctly
Cards render correctly on mobile and desktop
Back navigation from community levels works
No regression in existing level select functionality
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced affecting existing level select or gameplay, revert
